google.text: TRUCKLOAD RATE CONFIRMATION RWB Trucking Wintrust Bank N.A. FBO: RWB Trucking, LLC P.O. Box 7177 CAROL STREAM, IL 60197 RWB TRUCKING, LLC Carrier Name: AUTHORITY CARRIERS Ready Date: 3/20/2026 Date Needed: 3/23/2026 Service Level: Normal Insurance Declared Value: 158,000.00 Load #: 128195758 Customer PO: Shipper Ref: Trailer Type/Size: 53 ft Reefer / Full Temperature: 28 f continuous Shipper Information: Name: Address: Pickup Instructions: Americold Vineland 2111 INDUSTRIAL WAY VINELAND, NJ 08360 Carrier must request to observe loading on the dock, confirm case count and no damages/properly loaded. Driver must count all cases and sign the BOL. Contact: Phone: Email: If you are not allowed on the dock, you need to let RWB Trucking know before getting loaded. Also request to view unloading to confirm count is correct at the receiver. Send broker the BOL before leaving the shipper for confirmation that you are good to go. Swing doors, General Liability Insurance, Clean Odorless food grade trailer properly precooled all required PickUp for pickup. CARRIERS ARE REQUIRED TO PUT TRAILERS IN SECURED Appointment YARDS WHEN PARKING OVER NIGHT. IF THERE ARE NO SECURED Date & Time YARDS THEY ARE REQUIRED TO BACK INTO A BUILDING SO NOBODY CAN GET IN THE TRAILER. AT NO TIMES CAN A DRIVER UNHOOK THE TRAILER AND LEAVE IT UNATTENDED. Text/Call Joey at 6303799012 for any questions or assistance. Verify case count before booking. Carrier must bring empty scale ticket to shipper. Must send PODS right after delivery to omar@rwbtrucking.com Receiver Information: Name: Address: COLORADO PREMIUM FOODS Delivery Instructions: 2035 2ND AVE GREELEY, CO 80631 MUST TELL RECEIVER THIS IS A LIVE UNLOAD. If the receiver signs for any case count amount other than the amount on the BOL, RWB must be notified immediately and the driver needs to stay on site until the receiver has verified the received case count and RWB has had time to alert the customer. Detention starts after 4 hours.
